title: Streaming War
titleNative: ストリーミング・ウォー
synopsis: To become a top-notch streamer, a reckless girl named Yoru Kihara, also known as "Angel Hell," earns money through extreme streaming. Thanks to the support of her fans, she managed to save up her target amount to move to the city. However, her abusive parents took everything: her savings and her streaming equipment. In utter despair, Yoru attempts her final act—streaming her own suicide from an abandoned building. But suddenly, she’s attacked by someone wearing a creepy rabbit mask. This marks her fateful encounter with "Streaming War," a grotesque streaming site where underground streamers go to satisfy their insatiable need for recognition!

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!
searchTerms: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ

synonyms: It's Mary-san. I'm in another world now...
synopsis: Naibara Hirokazu left his parent's home in Miyagi to attend university in Tokyo and began living alone in an apartment in Saitama. Soon after moving, he answers a phone call from an unknown number that rings repeatedly, and hears a girl's voice saying "I'm Mary, I'm at the garbage dump right now... I'm the doll you threw away..." Thinking it's a prank call, he hangs up, but the call comes again and again... It seems like the girl is calling little by little, moving towards him!? The next day, he answers the phone, not knowing how many times it has already been called, and hears "I'm Mary, I'm in front of your room right now..." No sooner does he hear a strange voice praying from outside the apartment...? A phone call from Saitama to give advice to Mary, the urban legend who has been transported to another world!? A little girl connected by smartphone to a university student's story of defeating the demon king!! (Source: Gamma Plus, translated)

titleNative: 전직 성녀와 흑막의 비밀 연애
synopsis: Ji-Yeon Kim, a college student on a leave of absence, was living an ordinary life until she found herself possessed into a romance novel her friend had shown her: The Saint's Flower. She became Iola, a girl who appeared halfway through the book. The world of the novel, centered around the saintly heroine and her romantic lead, was not meant for her. Still, she thought that becoming a character in a story might bring her happiness—just like the protagonist of a novel would. But everyone hurled hatred at her. They despised her. They called her Iola, the wicked woman who tormented the heroine—a false saint. But the truth was different. Iola herself was the true saint. Blessed by the divine, she returns to the very beginning. This time, she no longer needs her family, those who hate her, the title of Saint, or even the fiancé she once loved. She will walk a different path than before. synopsis: The Kozuki family was granted the Black Dragon's blessing, allowing them to heal the sick and purify impurity with their voices alone. In response to her desperate plea, the Black Dragon appears as a striking man and takes her hand, whisking her away to his realm. Chosen to be the bride of the Black Dragon Saku, Ayame finds herself in the enchanting Black Dragon Manor, suspended between the heavens and the human world. But jealousy ignites in Mari, who vows to reclaim Saku and make Ayame suffer once more. (Source: Pocket Comics)

synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)
